channel.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Jun 1st, 2021
item.description:
Articles

  • Making Electron apps feel native on Mac

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Jan 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Videos

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Jan 21st, 2020
item.description:
Tools

For Electron

  • electron-create-menustars35 - Default menus for all platforms, easily extendable, and with i18n support.
  • electronmonstars28 - Monitor and reload apps out-of-process during development.

    • Articles

  • Notarizing your Electron app - How to configure your app packaging for Apple's notarization.

    • Apps

    Other
  • massCodestars1.7k - Code snippet manager for developers.

item.description:

  • #electron on Atom Slack

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Nov 28th, 2017

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Jun 14th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

For Electron

  • fix-pathstars214 - Fix the $PATH on macOS when run from a GUI app. Useful when spawning a child process.
  • electron-osx-signstars397 - Code-signing for macOS apps.
  • electron-osx-appearancestars168 - Simplified API for accessing macOS's appearance settings.

    • Components

  • React Desktopstars9.1k - UI toolkit for macOS and Windows built with React.
  • titlebarstars477 - Emulate the macOS window titlebar.

    • Articles

  • Codesigning your app for macOS
  • Auto-updating apps for macOS and Windows: The complete guide

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-electron Apr 19th, 2016
item.description:
Apps

Featured
  • WebTorrentstars8.2k - Streaming torrent client.
  • SpaceRadarstars1.1k - Interactive disk space and memory visualization.
  • Visual Studio Codestars115.6k - Cross-platform IDE.

    • Apps

    Other
  • Git-itstars3.8k - Teaches you Git and GitHub.
  • Caprinestars5.9k - Unofficial Facebook Messenger app.
  • Simplenotestars3.5k - Note keeper.
  • nuTorrentstars218 - BitTorrent client.
  • Abricotinestars2.2k - Markdown editor with inline preview.
  • Medisstars10.1k - Redis database management.
  • Kakapostars389 - Ambient sound mixer for relaxation or productivity.
  • SmartMirrorstars2.6k - Voice controlled smart mirror.
  • Kokostars311 - IRC client.
  • Cumulusstars1.3k - SoundCloud player in your menubar.
  • FatFileFinderstars158 - Find large files on your machine.
  • Imageminstars822 - Minify images.
  • Monustars1.1k - Process monitoring.
  • Colonizersstars139 - "Catan" inspired board game.
  • Google Play Music Desktop Playerstars8.5k - Unofficial Google Play Music app.
  • Anselstars275 - Image organizer.

    • Apps

    Closed Source

  • GitKraken - Git client.
  • 1Clipboard - Universal clipboard manager.
  • Postman - Create and send HTTP requests.

    • Tools

    For Electron

  • ipc-streamstars134 - Duplex stream over IPC.
  • is-electron-rendererstars75 - Check if your code is running in main or renderer.
  • electron-is-devstars364 - Check if Electron is running in development.
  • electron-localshortcutstars373 - Add keyboard shortcuts locally to a window.
  • auto-launchstars772 - Launch apps at system startup.
  • nutsstars1.1k - Releases server with auto-updater and GitHub as a backend.
  • electron-dlstars792 - Simplified file downloads.
  • electron-release-serverstars1.5k - Self-hosted release server with front-end & auto-updater support.
  • electron-sudostars336 - Subprocesses with administrative privileges.
  • electron-downloadstars238 - Download the Electron release zip from GitHub.
  • electron-detachstars58 - Restart an Electron app as a detached process.
  • ember-electronstars794 - Build, test, and package Ember apps.
  • electrifystars248 - Package Meteor apps.

    • Tools

    Using Electron

  • Nightmare - High-level browser automation library (alternative to PhantomJS).
  • nativefierstars27k - Create an app of any website.
  • electron-pdfstars1.1k - Generate PDF from URL, HTML, or Markdown files on the command-line.
  • Geojsonappstars327 - Preview GeoJSON locally.
  • electron-harstars39 - Command-line tool for generating HTTP Archive (HAR).

    • Components

  • Photon - UI toolkit for building beautiful apps.
  • React PhotonKitstars394 - Photon components built with React.
  • chrome-tabsstars1.4k - Chrome like tabs.

    • Community

  • #atom-shell on Freenode
